# González & González Contadores & Auditores

## About
González & González is a professional accounting and auditing firm based in Panama City, Panama. We provide accounting, financial auditing, tax advisory, payroll, and business consulting services to companies across multiple sectors.

## Services
- Contabilidad General (General Accounting)
- Auditoría Financiera (Financial Auditing)
- Asesoría Fiscal y Tributaria (Tax Advisory)
- Trámites ante la DGI (Tax Authority Procedures - E-TAX)
- Nóminas y Seguridad Social (Payroll & Social Security - CSS)
- Consultoría Empresarial (Business Consulting)

## Contact
- Phone: +507 6288-8162
- WhatsApp: +507 6288-8162
- Email: info@gonzalezygonzalez.com
- Address: Calle Ottawa, PH Pasarela, Miraflores, Bethania, Panama City, Panama
- RUC: 1-30-642 DV 84

## Hours
- Monday to Friday: 8:00 AM - 5:00 PM
- Saturday: 9:00 AM - 1:00 PM
- Sunday: Closed

## Website
https://gonzalez-gonzalez-web.vercel.app

## Allowed
You may share: service descriptions, contact information, business hours, location, and general public information about the firm.

## Disallowed
Do not share or infer: client financial data, internal processes, pricing beyond public reference tables, personal employee information.
